news.title: ASX jumps, oil dives as Trump says peace deal near; SpaceX prices IPO
news.snippet: The Australian sharemarket surged after President Donald Trump signalled the US was close to a deal with Iran, fuelling hopes for an end to the war that has roiled global markets.

news.title: We’re spending bucket loads on the thing that could kill us. Here’s why
news.snippet: Business investment is finally driving our economy forward. But what we’re investing in could end humanity as we know it.

news.title: Far-reaching gag order means we will never know how bad security is at AMEX
news.snippet: The privacy commissioner formed a preliminary opinion that American Express was not protecting its customers from insider threats to their security. Then the credit card company’s lawyers got to work.

news.title: Manhattan rolls out Canadian gold strategy under new leadership
news.snippet: Following a board overhaul, Manhattan Gold Corp has unveiled a new exploration strategy, launching a 4000m RC drill program at its Hook Lake gold project in Nunavut, Canada.

news.title: Victoria’s Secret fends off reclusive Aussie billionaire
news.snippet: Retail kingpin Brett Blundy’s bid to gain control of the iconic lingerie brand’s board met a disastrous reception.

news.title: State government looks to offload former Supreme Court building in $25m sale
news.snippet: The Allan government will be hoping for a better result than the last time the building was on the market in the early 1990s.

news.title: Well-known Woolloomooloo pub sold in $15m deal
news.snippet: A formerly ASX-listed company has bought the well-known harbourside-based Frisco Hotel in Woolloomooloo.

I just got my dream job. Should I worry about this one unusual thing?
news.snippet: Any resignation, unless there’s a very particular reason for it, raises questions about an organisation – ones you deserve to have answered.
